inputs.label: Energy in Ergs
inputs.businessContext: The amount of energy in ergs to be converted to joules.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of energy in ergs to be converted to joules.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Joule'a dönüştürülecek erg cinsinden enerji miktarı.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fixed conversion factor: 1 erg = 1e-7 joules. Adjustable for system calibration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed conversion factor: 1 erg = 1e-7 joules. Adjustable for system calibration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit dönüşüm faktörü: 1 erg = 1e-7 joule. Sistem kalibrasyonu için ayarlanabilir.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı değeri için ondalık basamak sayısı.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated measurement uncertainty percentage to calculate tolerance range.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated measurement uncertainty percentage to calculate tolerance range.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tolerans aralığını hesaplamak için tahmini ölçüm belirsizliği yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Operator ID
inputs.businessContext: Identifier of the operator performing the calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Identifier of the operator performing the calculation.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
